title: ClientProtocolProvider
description: This directory provides a way to create and close connections to a remote service. The files collaborate by using the ClientProtocol interface to establish and terminate connections. The architectural role of this directory is to abstract the details of connecting to a remote service, allowing other components to interact with the service without needing to know the specifics of the connection process.

raw_response:
TITLE: ClientProtocolProvider

DESCRIPTION:
This directory provides a way to create and close connections to a remote service. The files collaborate by using the ClientProtocol interface to establish and terminate connections. The architectural role of this directory is to abstract the details of connecting to a remote service, allowing other components to interact with the service without needing to know the specifics of the connection process.
